summary: VELA backend & frontend tested end-to-end against live preview URL. 16/16 pytest backend tests pass (health, demo, auth, properties CRUD, Emergent object storage upload+download, real Claude Sonnet 4.5 vision analysis with proper schema, logout). 8/8 critical frontend flows pass (landing hero, demo dashboard with all metrics + 3 action-plan tabs, pricing 4 tiers, method, ProtectedRoute redirects to /login when unauth, authenticated /analyze + /dashboard list with 'Sample Asset' card).

issues: Recharts emits width(-1)/height(-1) warning on first render, container resolves correctly afterwards — cosmetic console noise only

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~720 lines but single-responsibility per route; acceptable. Could split DEMO_PROPERTY/DEMO_ANALYSIS into a separate seed module for cleanliness.
auth_session always inserts a NEW user_sessions row on every login — sessions table will grow unbounded. Consider upserting on session_token or adding a TTL index on expires_at.

/api/files/{file_id} only resolves files belonging to the requesting user (good). Consider adding shared/demo file public download if external_url isn't used — currently fine because demo uses external_url.
Cookie auth uses samesite=none + secure (correct for cross-site preview). Verified working via injected cookie.
All MongoDB reads use {_id: 0} projection — no ObjectId leaks observed in any response.
test_credentials: Inserted ad-hoc users + sessions in MongoDB test_database (per /app/auth_testing.md). Session token used for FE: test_session_fe_1778222245077. Backend pytest creates its own per-run sessions.
seed_data_creation: MongoDB users + user_sessions inserted by conftest._create_session() and frontend cookie injection. Test properties prefixed TEST_VELA_*. Not cleaned up but isolated per user_id.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test entrypoint: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_vela_backend.py -v. AI analyze test takes ~30s (real Claude Sonnet 4.5 call). For FE auth, insert mongo session and add cookie session_token with domain hospitality-ai-12.preview.emergentagent.com, secure=True, sameSite=None.
